last_assistant_message:
DONE: Wave 2 Track B fully implemented — 171 tests green, `wave-2-track-B` tag applied.

Files created/modified:
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\search\fuse.ts` — score fusion: `α·norm(bm25) + β·norm(cosine) + γ·importance + δ·freshness`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\search\query.ts` — filter parser: `type:`, `repo:`, `project:`, `since:Nd/Nh` tokens
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\search\search.ts` — hybrid orchestrator: FTS5 + vec (mock), fuse, post-fusion SQL filters
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\server\routes\search.ts` — GET /search, POST /recall, POST /remember
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\server\routes\memory.ts` — GET /memory/:id
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\server\app.ts` — MODIFIED: accepts optional `EmbedProvider`, registers 2 new route groups
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\cli\search.ts` — `cliSearch`, `cliRecall`, `cliRemember`
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\src\cli\index.ts` — MODIFIED: dispatches `search`, `recall`, `remember` commands
- `C:\work\mega\astramemory-local\tests\search\fuse.test.ts`, `tests\search\query.test.ts`, `tests\server\search.test.ts`, `tests\server\memory.test.ts`

**Commit list since wave-1-foundation (Track B commits):**
1. `e631d0c` — feat(search): fuse score formula + query filter parser
2. `f0abbbe` — feat(search+routes): hybrid orchestrator + /search /recall /remember /memory/:id
3. `08670d2` — feat(cli): search, recall, remember commands

**Test count green:** 171 (24 test files; Wave 1's 15 tests all still green; 4 skipped = Track D live-integration tests)

**Doctor check string for Track C:** "Search returns hits for a known-inserted fixture memory"

Risks: `buildApp` now has an optional `embed` field that defaults to the deterministic fake — existing callers (`serve.ts`, E2E test) don't inject a real provider yet. Track D landing point is to pass `getProviders(cfg).embed` into `serve()` → `buildApp()`. No schema changes made.
